GB/T 39928一2021
Foreword
SAC/VTC 224 is in charge of this English translation. In case of any doubt about the contents of English
translation，the Chinese original shall be considered authoritative.
This standard is drafted in accordance with the rules given in the GB/T 1.1一2009 Directives for
standardization一Part 1:Structure and drafting of stanadaras .
This standard was proposed by China Light Industry Council.
This standard was prepared by SAC/TC 224 National Technical Standardization Committee on Light-
ing .

亚
